de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class EnumClassBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • recoder.kit.Transformation
      • recoder.kit.TwoPassTransformation
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RecoderModelTransformer
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.EnumClassBuilder

  • public class EnumClassBuilder
extends RecoderModelTransformer
    This transformation is made to transform any found EnumDeclaration into a corresponding EnumClassDeclaration.
    Since:
    2006-11-20
    Version:
    2006-11-21
    Author:
    mulbrich

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.RecoderModelTransformer

      a mapping of constant references in switch-statements and their substitutes.
      (package private) Map<EnumDeclaration,EnumClassDeclaration> substitutes
      a mapping of enums to the newly created class declarations.

    • Field Detail

      • substitutes

        Map<EnumDeclaration,EnumClassDeclaration> substitutes
        a mapping of enums to the newly created class declarations.

      • caseSubstitutes

        Map<FieldReference,UncollatedReferenceQualifier> caseSubstitutes
        a mapping of constant references in switch-statements and their substitutes.

    • Constructor Detail

      • EnumClassBuilder

        public EnumClassBuilder(CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration services,
                RecoderModelTransformer.TransformerCache cache)
        create a new instance that uses the given service configuration and works on the given list of compilation units
        Parameters:
        services - the cross referencing service configuration to be used
        cache - a cache object that stores information which is needed by and common to many transformations. it includes the compilation units, the declared classes, and information for local classes.

    • Method Detail

      • analyze

        public ProblemReport analyze()
        find all enum declarations and make their substitutes. find all case usages of enum constants and make their substitutes. we may not the cache which buffers classes only not enums!
        Overrides:
        analyze in class TwoPassTransformation
        See Also:
        TwoPassTransformation.analyze()

      • addCases

        private void addCases(EnumDeclaration ed)
        find enumconstants in case statements and mark them for substitution. Use the cross reference property and find all case usages of enum constants replace them by their fully qualified name, if they are not qualified.
        Parameters:
        ed - the EnumDeclaration to search for.

      • makeExplicit

        protected void makeExplicit(TypeDeclaration td)
        Deprecated. THIS DOES NOT WORK ANY MORE, SINCE THE CACHE ONLY CONSIDERS CLASSE TYPES, NOT ENUMS!
        substitute EnumDeclarations by EnumClassDeclarations.
        Specified by:
        makeExplicit in class RecoderModelTransformer
        See Also:
        RecoderModelTransformer.makeExplicit(recoder.java.declaration.TypeDeclaration)

      • transform

        public void transform()
        substitute all case statements that have been recorded earlier. call super class to invoke "makeExplicit".
        Overrides:
        transform in class RecoderModelTransformer
        See Also:
        RecoderModelTransformer.transform()
